name: python3-flaskext.wtf
title: python3-flaskext.wtf
summary: Simple integration of Flask and WTForms (Python 3)
description:
Simple integration of Flask and WTForms (Python 3)
Flask-WTF is an extension for Flask, providing a simple integration
of WTForms. It includes optional CSRF handling and Recaptcha support.
.
This is a Python 3 package
